query: SELECT r.id, r.form_id, r.respondent_name, r.respondent_email, r.is_complete, r.status, r.created_at, f.title as form_title, f.is_template FROM form_responses r JOIN forms f ON r.form_id = f.id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2FrvTurB9J6YsbF.19ef00e26ab3 --database bDyKxbJirDkukZmvFFZQ8p --execute SELECT r.id, r.form_id, r.respondent_name, r.respondent_email, r.is_complete, r.status, r.created_at, f.title as form_title, f.is_template FROM form_responses r JOIN forms f ON r.form_id = f.id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
